name: P-3 prompt-eval writes the result to prompts/eval-history/<id>/<version>.json per the architecture path
command: mkdir -p evals/datasets/agents && printf '{"id":"r1","input":"x","expected":"y"}\n' > evals/datasets/agents/test-agent.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/prompt-eval.sh" test-agent --version 1.0.0 2>err.txt && [ -s prompts/eval-history/test-agent/1.0.0.json ] && echo emitted 1>&2
